title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
